title: Unknown Coordinates
story: [Meridian-7 Log #012] Coordinate pairs have appeared in the signal — in (number, number) format. Is rEx telling you its location? Or guiding you somewhere? Numbers can be integers or decimals, and precision seems important. Extract all valid coordinates.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that matches the coordinate format (number, number), where numbers can be integers or decimals
hints: [Hint] Numbers can have an optional decimal part
[Hint] The decimal point and following digits must appear together or not at all
promptHints: Describe the complete coordinate format, including parentheses and comma
Tell the AI that numbers can be integers or decimals
Hint the AI that the decimal part is optional (? quantifier)

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Coordinates locked. rEx's signal has a spatial dimension.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Coordinate parsing failed. Handling optional parts is the key.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Spatial coordinates perfectly captured. Masterful use of quantifiers.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual positioning. Every coordinate is spot-on.
